questions.question:
(a) Simplify: (2³ × 2⁴) ÷ 2⁵
(b) Find the value of x if 3^(x+1) = 27.

A trader bought 50 oranges at ₦80 per dozen and sold each at ₦10.
(a) How much did he spend buying all the oranges?
(b) How much did he make from selling all?
(c) Calculate his percentage profit.

The ages of students in a class are: 12, 14, 13, 15, 12, 14, 13, 12, 15, 14.
(a) Prepare a frequency table.
(b) Find the modal age.
(c) Calculate the mean age.
questions.answer:
(a) Frequency Table:
Age | Freq
12  |  3
13  |  2
14  |  3
15  |  2
Total = 10

(b) Modal age = 12 and 14 (bimodal)

(c) Mean = (36+26+42+30) ÷ 10 = 134 ÷ 10 = 13.4 years

questions.question:
Solve the simultaneous equations:
2x + 3y = 12
3x - y = 7
questions.answer:
From equation 2: y = 3x - 7  ...(3)

Substitute (3) into equation 1:
2x + 3(3x - 7) = 12
2x + 9x - 21 = 12
11x = 33
x = 3

y = 3(3) - 7 = 2

∴ x = 3 and y = 2

questions.question:
ABCD is a rectangle with AB = 8 cm and BC = 6 cm.
(a) Calculate the area.
(b) Calculate diagonal AC.
(c) Find the perimeter.
questions.answer:
(a) Area = 8 × 6 = 48 cm²

(b) AC² = 8² + 6² = 64 + 36 = 100
AC = 10 cm

(c) Perimeter = 2(8 + 6) = 28 cm

questions.question:
A bag contains 5 red, 3 blue, and 2 green balls.
(a) P(red)?
(b) P(blue or green)?
(c) P(not red)?

Mr. Ade invested ₦150,000 at 8% compound interest per annum.
(a) Find the amount after 2 years.
(b) Find the compound interest earned.
Using completing the square, solve: x² + 6x + 5 = 0
questions.answer:
x² + 6x = -5

Add (6/2)² = 9 to both sides:
(x + 3)² = 4

x + 3 = ±2

x = -1 or x = -5

questions.question:
The 3rd term of an AP is 7 and the 8th term is 22.
(a) Find the first term and common difference.
(b) Find the sum of the first 15 terms.

A sector of a circle has radius 14 cm and angle 90°. (π = 22/7)
(a) Find the arc length.
(b) Find the area of the sector.
(c) Find the area of triangle formed.
